title: Login Page Visual Redesign
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the login page to have a modern, branded design similar to Salesforce's login experience, so that the first impression of the application feels professional and familiar.
description:
Redesign the login page layout and styling to create a professional, branded experience modeled after Salesforce's login flow.

## Layout Changes
- Remove `flex-whatsnew` vertical centering so text aligns to top
- Add background image to the right pane with CSS: `background-size: cover; background-position: 30% 50%; border-radius: 20px`
- Set left pane background color to `#F4F6F9`
- Move logo outside of the login box
- Adjust column proportions to match the Salesforce-style two-pane layout
acceptance_criteria: Login page displays a two-pane layout with form on left and branding on right
Right pane displays the background image with cover sizing
Logo appears above the login form, outside the login box
Layout is modeled after the Salesforce login experience
Passcode page uses the same visual template
ux_changes: Complete login page redesign with a two-pane Salesforce-style layout, branded background image, updated color scheme, and repositioned logo.
implementation_notes: Background image URL initially broken on the WordPress CDN. Developer implemented the layout changes and applied the same treatment to the passcode verification page.
comment_summary: Developer implemented the layout changes but the background image URL was initially unavailable. Both login and passcode pages were updated with the new template.
